title: Better Netherite Upgrading Reloaded
description: A Spigot plugin to adjust Netherite upgrading cost based on item type.
body:
### Better Netherite Upgrading Reloaded

A Spigot plugin to adjust Netherite upgrading cost based on item type.
Support for Minecraft 1.20+

The plugin can keep the enchantments, lores and other item attributes.

With this plugin upgrading to netherite works the exact same as vanilla, but you choose the amount of netherite ingots you need to upgrade your gear.

By default, upgrading costs the amount of diamonds it takes to make(ex diamond sword needs 2 ingots, diamond boots needs 4).


1.16-1.19.4 Version: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/better-netherite-upgrading.85326/
